description_long: This fence features a timber frame construction with vertical and diagonal wooden beams, creating a sturdy and traditional appearance. The lower section is composed of solid panels, while the upper section is partially open, filled with translucent or frosted material, possibly acrylic or glass, for partial visibility and light passage. The frame is reinforced with horizontal and diagonal supports, giving it a half-timbered look reminiscent of Tudor or rustic urban fencing. The wood is finished in a medium brown, contrasting with the lighter beige or tan panels. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The fence is likely intended for property demarcation or privacy in urban or residential settings.
description: A timber-framed fence with solid lower panels and translucent upper sections, reinforced by vertical and diagonal wooden beams. The design is simple and functional, with a rustic, half-timbered appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full timber frame, diagonal supports, and the contrast between the solid lower panels and translucent upper section.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the depth of the frame, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the fence, with the solid lower panel and translucent upper section, and no visible supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the layered construction of the fence.
